Spring Data for Apache Cassandra
  1. org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.mapping.event

Uses of Package
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.mapping.event

Packages that use org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.mapping.event
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core
Apache Cassandra core support.
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.mapping.event
Event callback infrastructure for Cassandra mapping subsystem.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.mapping.event used by org.springframework.data.cassandra.core
    Class
    Description
    CassandraMappingEvent
    Base ApplicationEvent triggered by Spring Data Cassandra.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.mapping.event used by org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.mapping.event
    Class
    Description
    AbstractDeleteEvent
    Base class for delete events.
    AbstractStatementAwareMappingEvent
    Event encapsulating Cassandra CQL statement.
    AfterConvertEvent
    Event to be triggered after converting a Row into an entity.
    AfterDeleteEvent
    Event being thrown after a single or a set of rows has/have been deleted.
    AfterLoadEvent
    Event to be triggered after loading Rows to be mapped onto a given type.
    AfterSaveEvent
    CassandraMappingEvent triggered after save of an object.
    BeforeConvertCallback
    Callback being invoked before a domain object is converted to be persisted.
    BeforeDeleteEvent
    Event thrown before a row or a set of rows is deleted.
    BeforeSaveEvent
    Mapping event triggered before inserting or updating a row in the database.
    CassandraMappingEvent
    Base ApplicationEvent triggered by Spring Data Cassandra.
    ReactiveBeforeConvertCallback
    Callback being invoked before a domain object is converted to be persisted.
